name: Crunchy Chocolate Peanut Butter Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine the corn syrup and brown sugar.
2. Cook and stir until the mixture comes to a full boil.
3. Stir in the peanut butter.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the cereal, chocolate pieces, and vanilla.
5. Press into an ungreased 9x9x2 inch pan.
6. Chill for 1 hour.
7. Cut into bars.
